text.message: Worried about who’s taking road if reds got army
Blue you going for road with wood port?
green has the much more better sheep
Red are gonna go for road or army?
its everytime the guy with a very good position who stars this lame table talk lol
Your lol’s and comments are even worse than my table talk
you are funny, i was the road threat
You’re in a better spot than me.
I mean green embargo’d me so
i see its everyone, but not oj
When the 4th place guy embargo’s the 3rd it’s not a good game
but can you stop this table talk
I’m not going to sit around and lose
Imagine pointing it out in the early game
And the table saying “nice table talk”
and why you block me solo and not blue
